title: pinus pectinata
intro: Pinus pectinata, also known as the "cluster pine", is a species of evergreen tree native to Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pinus pectinata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from skin conditions to respiratory infections.
